data.title: Add Step 5 (Prompt Alignment) to scrutiny pipeline
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Modify `plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md`. Add Step 5 (Prompt Alignment) between Step 4 (Fidelity Review) and Pipeline Output.

Step 5 contents:
1. **LLM-Instruction Signal Detection**: Define canonical keyword list: skill file modifications, agent definitions, prompt templates, hook behavioral logic. Case-insensitive scan of epic spec (Context + SC + Approach).
2. **Doc-Epic Exclusion**: If Approach section references only doc files (.md, documentation paths), skip prompt alignment. Log: "Doc-epic exclusion — skipping prompt alignment."
3. **If signal fires**: (a) Run provider-agnostic GitHub prior-art search via WebSearch for similar prompts in popular AI/LLM projects, (b) Present findings for collaborative prompt drafting with user, (c) Dispatch bot-psychologist via Agent tool to review draft prompt text, (d) Incorporate findings into epic spec.
4. **State variable exposure**: Set matched_keyword = <matched keyword> for planning-intelligence log consumption.
5. **Graceful degradation**: If WebSearch or bot-psychologist fails, log warning and continue — do not block pipeline.

**TDD**: Task c942-1316 RED tests turn GREEN after this implementation.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md (EDIT — add Step 5)
- .test-index (EDIT — remove [test-prompt-alignment-step] RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] All 7 prompt-alignment tests pass (GREEN state)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-prompt-alignment-step.sh
- [ ] Existing pipeline tests still pass (no regression)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
- [ ] Remove RED marker from .test-index (GREEN promotion)
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test-prompt-alignment-step\]' .test-index
